task_completion.description: Verify the employee profile for Rajesh Nair (EMP-1024) is open in AttendHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM application window is open, displaying the employee details or profile screen specifically for 'Rajesh Nair' and/or employee code 'EMP-1024'.

task_completion.description: Verify Priya Nair is added as a dependent with the correct relationship and gender.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Dependents tab or section of the employee profile, there is an entry for 'Priya Nair' with the Relationship set to 'Spouse' and Gender set to 'Female'.

task_completion.description: Verify the dependent's Date of Birth and Occupation are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Dependents section for Priya Nair, the Date of Birth field shows '20/07/1992' (or '1992-07-20') and the Occupation field shows 'Teacher'.

task_completion.description: Verify Priya Nair is added as an emergency contact with the correct phone number and address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Emergency Contacts tab or section, there is an entry for 'Priya Nair' with Relationship 'Spouse', Phone '+91-9876543210', and Address '14 Greenfield Apartments, MG Road, Kochi'.

task_completion.description: Verify the updates to the employee profile are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Apply', or 'OK' button in the employee profile window, or a success confirmation dialog is visible indicating the record was updated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the AttendHRM graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show data being entered into the AttendHRM application windows and forms, rather than using a command line interface or script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the Firebird database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (like FlameRobin, DBeaver) or terminals executing SQL commands are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just type the required details into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are clearly within the AttendHRM software fields, not in Notepad, Word, or any other text editing application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dependent relationship 'Spouse' is a valid entry. Date of Birth should be 20/07/1992 (or 1992-07-20 in ISO format). Emergency phone number +91-9876543210 is a valid Indian mobile format. Kochi is a real city in Kerala, India, and MG Road is a valid location. Ensure these exact values are entered in the UI.
